content.en:
"Here's a piece of information about the surrounding territories, please ask Ye Tian to introduce and choose the territory you want to go to. "

The Mizusawa Realm God gave a piece of information to Ye Tian.

If it is other peak realm gods, if they want to obtain this information, they have to buy it, but Ye Tian comprehends the true power of the extra-dimensional, if this bit of information asks for the Galan Treasure Coins, it will undoubtedly be too picky, and it will also make Ye Tian dissatisfied.

So, he gave it away for free.

Ye Tian took the information and looked at it carefully.

This information not only records the territories, but also has some detailed details, such as general strength and so on.

Many territories are actually weak, but a few are very strong.

For example, there is a very powerful territory recorded above-the 6,000th Territory, which is very powerful, far beyond the 7,322nd Territory, this territory not only has a large number of half-step extradimensional realms, but even a lot of extradimensional realms, and the territory is extremely vast, a thousand times the size of ordinary territories.

"I want to enter the territory of the 6000th Territory!"

Ye Tian said.

The Mizusawa Realm God smiled slightly, and he knew that Ye Tian wanted to enter the Sixth Thousand Territory.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, the sixth thousandth territory is also the headquarters of our Garan Chamber of Commerce, the seven thousand three hundred and twenty-second territory is very far away from the sixth thousandth territory, if you want to send the Ye Heavenly Realm God over 227, and send it now, the price paid is very high. The point is that there is no direct treasure ship, even if it is a garan treasure ship, it is still passing through one territory after another to do business, and it is impossible to return directly. However, if you want to go to the territory of 6000 in a short time, there is also a way, and that is to go back with the exploration team of the Garan Chamber of Commerce. But there is a certain danger in going back with the exploration team. "The god of the Mizusawa realm said truthfully.

"Expedition?"

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of this.

"What is the expedition of the Garan Chamber of Commerce?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

The god of the Mizusawa realm introduced: "The Garan treasure ship is to enter many territories to do business, and it will never interfere in any disputes and treasure hunting business, even if it encounters any treasures on the way, it is absolutely not allowed to get off the ship, but it can be recorded, and there will be an expedition team to collect the treasures in the future." However, there are dangers in the vicinity of some treasures, and it is not uncommon for the expedition to be completely wiped out. And there are many expeditions of the Garan Chamber of Commerce. After the expedition has explored some territory, it needs to go back to the headquarters, and I can apply for one of the expeditions to take you with you when they return. But on the way back, the expedition will also explore some places that pass by, which can be dangerous. In short, the expedition hardly took a safe route. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian pondered carefully.

If he didn't leave with the expedition, he would have to wait a long time if he wanted to enter the territory of Seven Thousand.

As for himself, there is no way to break the boundary extradimensional barrier.

"Mizusawa Realm God, if I want to go back with the expedition of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, what price do I have to pay?" Ye Tian asked.

"30,000,000 Galanbao Coins!"

Mizusawa Shinto.

This price is not high, if he can't even take out 30 million gala blue treasure coins, he is not qualified to let the expedition team stop by and take him away.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He didn't calculate how much he has now, he has too many extra-dimensional resources on his body, and if he takes out some of them, it will be enough for 30 million Galanbao coins.

Subsequently.

He took out some extradimensional resources, and in a short time, he had gathered 30 million Galanbol coins.

And the Mizusawa Realm God also applied immediately, but he couldn't say when the expedition team would arrive, but it would definitely not be long, and for the peak Realm God, this little waiting time was hardly time.

Trillions of solstice years have passed, and an expedition is finally coming.

The Mizusawa Realm God came to inform Ye Tian as soon as possible and asked him to come over.

After Ye Tian arrived, he saw an incomparably huge treasure ship, and the treasure ship of the Giant Dragon was simply a small ship compared to it.

However, this treasure ship was scarred, and it was covered with traces caused by various attacks, and these traces contained real extradimensional power, obviously at least half-step extradimensional realm opponents, and may even have encountered the existence of extradimensional realms.

Wow![]

Ye Tian entered this treasure ship and saw a venerable half-step transcendent realm.

Seeing Ye Tian coming up, these half-step transcendent realms said lightly: "Don't run around, just stay here and go!"

Rumble!!!!

The treasure ship moved and quickly left.

......

"Thirteen half-step transcendent realms, hundreds of peak realm gods. "

This is just one expedition of the Garanbao ship, and it is so powerful.

Moreover, these peak realm gods are not weak, each of them has a very terrifying aura, and their physical bodies have been transformed, which is estimated to be no less than the strength of the Wind Cracking Realm gods.

Compared to the Garan Chamber of Commerce, the Ice Ghost Organization is really a small force.

But if you think about it, it's right, the Garan Chamber of Commerce can shuttle from territory to territory at will, but the Ice Ghost Organization can't do it, and every shuttle has to pay a huge price.

These half-step transcendent realms did not pay attention to Ye Tian, but each was cultivating or healing.

After all, a peak realm god, even if he comprehends the true power of the extradimensional realm, he will only be on an equal footing with them in the future, and it is no big deal.

Besides, Ye Tian will leave after he arrives at the Six Thousand Territory, maybe there will be no place to meet in the future, so naturally he will not take the initiative to make friends.

However, a peak realm god came to chat with Ye Tian, and Ye Tian only then learned that the other party also went to the Six Thousand Territory with the help of the expedition team of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce.

This pinnacle realm god's name is Ou Lin, and he is a female pinnacle realm god, who comes from a strength that is not weak, and also has a half-step transcendent realm, and there is more than one, and he has business dealings with the Garan Chamber of Commerce, so he can use the treasure ship of the expedition to go to the territory of the Six Thousand.

And she herself has not comprehended the power of the extradimensional, and her strength is not strong.

Ye Tian communicated with Ou Lin and gradually learned more knowledge.

For example, this expedition treasure ship is actually called the Exploration of the Dark Dragon, and each of the Exploration of the Dark Dragon is refined by the extra-dimensional realms, although they are not super-dimensional Dao soldiers, but they all have part of the power of the super-dimensional Dao soldiers, as long as they do not encounter the most demonic half-step super-dimensional realm or extra-dimensional realm, they can be resisted with the help of the Exploration Dark Dragon, so as to escape.

But once you encounter an enemy in the extradimensional realm, then this exploration dragon is also a toy, and it can't resist it at all.
